helpful: The statpack is useful for quickly confirming the baseline grant rate.
gaps: The local corpus service (fedcourts query) was unreachable in the environment.
The CourtListener MCP server rate-limited the search requests immediately, preventing me from looking up circuit splits or lower court opinions.
notes: Degraded gracefully and relied on the provided snapshot and documents, which were sufficient to identify the waiver of response and predict a denial.
